content:
Fewer organic clicks, more paid clicks.

 

With the zero-click trend growing, it's only logical that Google (and others) push their paid products.

 

You're losing organic clicks left and right.
Do you want to get them back? just pay 😅

 

And this will be true on ChatGPT as well.

 

Source: Datos, A Semrush Company
Chart courtesy of Codex

images.alt: Line chart with orange squares and blue circles showing EU+UK vs US desktop paid-click shares.

headline: Fewer organic clicks, more paid clicks: can you recover?
description: With the zero-click trend rising, search engines push paid results while organic clicks fall. Data suggests paid options may reclaim visibility, even on
